message.loginSubtitle: Upload invoices and submit reimbursement forms with ease
message.studentLoginHint: Sign in with your student ID and password to create and submit reimbursement forms.
message.teacherLoginHint: Sign in with your employee ID and password to review and download student submissions.
message.studentHomeHint: Student features are coming soon. You will upload invoices and manage forms here.
message.teacherHomeHint: Review student forms by business category, filter, and download attachments as ZIP.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

error.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your account and password.
error.studentRoleMismatch: This account is not a student account. Switch to teacher sign-in.
error.teacherRoleMismatch: This account is not a teacher account. Switch to student sign-in.
